title: Briful 16.9" Artificial Plants in Pot Calathea Makoyana Fake Plants, Decorative Artificial Indoor Plants Maranta Faux Potted Plants for Home Office Bedroom Decor, Height 43CM, Dark Green
features: 【Tropical Life-Like House Plant】Bring the tropical warmth into your room with this artificial calathea plant. Dark green long leaves overlap one another and extend outward in various directions—giving this desk plant a fuller, lush look.
【Calathea Faux Plant】Decorative artificial plant comes in a black pot which serves to complement the vibrant leaves, making the rich green colour stand out even more.
【Eye-catching Calathea Plant】Thanks to the weight in the pot, the fake plant stands extremely reliably. However, the green plant looks very beautiful as an faux potted plant in one of your planters.

【Item Dimensions】Plant Height:16.9"/43cm, Pot Size: 5.5"x5.1"(14cm x 13cm). It will look amazing on a window sill, reception ledge, office desk or in the corner of any room to give the place a natural touch.
【Home Decoration】Real-looking calathea makoyana plants are very popular to decorate homes, parties and offices. They are also fit for housewarming gifts.
